---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an enhancement to the Platform Service
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement, needs-triage
assignees: ''

---

## Feature Description

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Problem/Motivation

Describe the problem this feature would solve.

## Proposed Solution

Describe your preferred solution.

## Alternatives Considered

A description of any alternative solutions you've considered.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, or API examples here.

## Impact

- **Affected endpoints**: [e.g., /api/v1/tenants, /api/v1/chat-agents]
- **Database changes required**: [Yes/No]
- **Breaking changes**: [Yes/No]
